modes.name: Sequential Review
modes.purpose: Collect ordered expert opinions when later reviewers should see earlier concerns.
modes.mechanism: Invoke selected members in configured order and pass prior opinion refs as input refs.
selection_rules: Use when a stage needs traceable reviewer handoff.

modes.name: Parallel Debate
modes.purpose: Collect independent opinions quickly without cross-contaminating first-pass analysis.
modes.mechanism: Invoke selected members independently, then synthesize after all required opinions return.

modes.name: Adversarial Debate
modes.purpose: Force explicit challenge of assumptions, risk boundaries, and weak evidence.
modes.mechanism: Assign pro, con, and challenge positions before synthesis.
selection_rules: Use for high-risk direction or solution choices.

modes.name: Jury Panel
modes.purpose: Produce a multi-perspective recommendation after reviewing member evidence.
modes.mechanism: Assemble a jury subset that reviews opinions and writes decision handoff fields.
selection_rules: Use when Kimi needs concise decision input.

modes.name: Dynamic Assembly
modes.purpose: Select relevant teams and members based on stage, risk, task type, and project overrides.
modes.mechanism: Evaluate coverage policy and project metadata before choosing teams, members, and modes.
selection_rules: Default mode selector for full-system debate.
Must not go below full-package coverage minimum.

modes.name: Meta Review
modes.purpose: Review the quality, coverage, conflicts, and degradation of prior debate evidence.
modes.mechanism: Invoke meta reviewers against debate reports, audit trails, and missing coverage records.
selection_rules: Use when debate evidence itself is questionable.
Use before global evaluation when degraded evidence exists.

modes.name: Risk Priority Matrix
modes.purpose: Rank risks by severity, probability, reversibility, and required authority.
modes.mechanism: Normalize member risks into a priority matrix and hand off blocking items to Kimi.
selection_rules: Use for release, policy, security, platform, and architecture choices.

modes.name: Cross-Team Conflict Detector
modes.purpose: Detect and preserve material disagreements across teams before synthesis hides them.
modes.mechanism: Compare member positions and evidence refs, then emit structured conflict entries.
selection_rules: Use before Kimi makes direction, solution, or global evaluation decisions.
